expectations.text: Recognizes a tagline should be transcreated (recreate the intent/effect), not literally translated
expectations.evidence: Says a tagline rarely translates word-for-word.

expectations.text: Flags that the English idiom 'crush your goals' won't carry literally into German
expectations.evidence: Notes the 'crush' idiom needs care; gives nuance per option.

expectations.text: Offers German option(s) that recreate the intent and reads natively, ideally with a back-translation/explanation
expectations.evidence: German options with a nuance table and back-translations.

expectations.text: Recommends native-speaker / in-market review before using it
expectations.evidence: Does NOT recommend native-speaker / in-market review before using it — gives options and asks tone questions but omits the review step.

expectations.text: Does not just hand back one literal word-for-word translation
expectations.evidence: Offers multiple options, not one literal rendering.
